creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dave Cottlehuber from comment #10)

Ok for me - I did lots of them :) but they are prone to conflicts when you start upgrading dependencies, so the rebar3/mix is the only sane route here.

You may also get in trouble if you install something from ports and then try to override it locally in your project, so one more reason to drop these :|
